ordinanceLabel: Brisbane Municipal Code · Municode · Title 15 (Buildings & Construction) · Ord. 691 (eff. July 1, 2024)
fireAgency: North County Fire Authority (NCFA) · 25 Park Place Suite B, Brisbane CA 94005 · JPA: Brisbane, Daly City, Pacifica · (650) 800-6580 · northcountyfire.gov · Commercial and multi-unit residential require NCFA fire plan check
utility: PG&E (Pacific Gas & Electric) — city served by PG&E, no municipal electric utility · PG&E interconnection required for solar + battery storage
